resources.string: From capture to tamper check — all in one place
AI fakes, stolen shots, edited photos —\nnothing slips past.
AI fakes, deepfakes, and stolen photos are everywhere. Prove your photos are real with TrueSnap.
Shoot with the TrueSnap camera and your photo is certified instantly — no extra steps needed.
Anyone who receives your photo can instantly check whether it\'s authentic — right in the app.
Manage your certifications in My Certifications, and extend them anytime for free.
Notifies you when a TrueSnap certification is about to expire
%d TrueSnap certifications expire tomorrow. Check My Certifications.
Save or share the photo you received from the photographer directly to this app.
Tap the button below to select the saved photo. The code in the photo will be read automatically.
Check the results for Step 1 (registration) and Step 2 (tamper check).
No code found. Please enter it manually.
Checks whether the photo changed significantly since certification. Minor edits may not be detected — don\'t rely solely on this result.
Unregistered ID — no certification found on server
This photo has not been altered since it was certified with TrueSnap.
No comparison data — tamper check unavailable
This result is for reference only. We recommend double-checking before making any decisions.
Enter the code shown in the photo.
No QR code found. Make sure the photo has a TrueSnap watermark.
Server took too long to respond. Please try again later.
Could not connect to server. Please try again later.
Security certificate verification failed. Please update the app.
Too many requests. Please try again later.
Server is under maintenance. Please try again later.
Server error. Please try again later.
An error occurred. Please try again later.
